tasks.title: Write the RequireAuth component
tasks.prompt: Write the Meridian RequireAuth component in TypeScript React. It must handle all three authentication states correctly. Use Zustand's useAuthStore.
success_criteria: If isLoading === true: return null (not a redirect)
If user === null: return <Navigate to='/login' replace />

tasks.title: Write the Auth Store
tasks.prompt: Write a Zustand auth store (useAuthStore) for Meridian. It must include: user state (User | null), isLoading state, setUser action, and a checkSession async action that calls GET /api/auth/me and handles all three outcomes (loading, found, not found).
success_criteria: isLoading: true initial state during session check
setIsLoading(false) called in both success and error paths
user set to null on 401 or error
checkSession sets isLoading to false before returning in all branches
